name: pr_tms_handoff_upd
drl:
rule A when Ord(amount > 100) then insertLogical(new Flag("v")); end
rule B when Ord(vip == true) then insertLogical(new Flag("v")); end
rule OBS when Flag($k : k) then insert(new Seen($k)); end
_finding: Justification handoff via ONE external update (external review round 16): rule A justifies the logical Flag; a single update simultaneously breaks A and forms B for the EQUAL value. The un-justification propagates at modify-propagation time - the key empties and the logical fact retracts BEFORE B fires its insertLogical - so the handoff FLICKERS: retract-then-reassert, and the stated observer double-counts (two Seen for one continuously-true Flag). Salience-invariant (structural, pre-agenda). Correct-for-identity Drools TMS, pinned byte-identical.
